text.content: 2026-05-10: Locked into Sprint 2 (Ken confirmed). Post-mortem INC-20260509-001 action item A1+A4. Build API-independent Telegram alert path — direct HTTP to Telegram Bot API, no Anthropic dependency. Must fire on: balance /bin/zsh, API down, gateway down, health_failure consecutive 3+. | COMPLETE 2026-05-10. Built scripts/telegram-alert.sh: direct Telegram Bot HTTP, no Anthropic/OpenClaw dependency, Keychain token, /usr/bin/curl only, retry x2. Wired into health-check.sh: (1) gateway consecutive failures >= threshold, (2) first Anthropic API unreachable detection. CHG-0262. Test confirmed HTTP 200.
